seoTitle: Mundoo Island vs Mundoora — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mundoo Island and Mundoora. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mundoo Island vs Mundoora: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mundoo Island and Mundoora.
heading: Mundoo Island vs Mundoora — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mundoo Island, South Australia and Mundoora, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mundoo Island has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Mundoora (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mundoo Island or Mundoora safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mundoo Island has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Mundoora scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mundoo Island scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Mundoora scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mundoo Island or Mundoora?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mundoo Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
